Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Avernus]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== House of Blades ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 23''' — Grandmaster Avernus sent out fliers to scout the wilderness between Bel Calem and Enosh.}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 12''' — Avernus Travelers wear feathered head-wraps.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 13''' — Avernus is a Territory that highly values loyalty.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 16''' — Avernus is a Territory that can be traveled through with difficulty.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 16''' — Alin walked into Avernus.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 18''' — Avernus is a Territory of birds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 20''' — Avernus is a place with diving white eagles.}}

== City of Light ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 4''' — Avernus is a Territory.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 11''' — Simon suspects Feiora's command is a mental attack from Avernus.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 11''' — Feiora Torannus is an Avernus.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 12''' — Avernus has guards on the other side.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 12''' — Avernus is a group or entity associated with traditional wooden armor and psychic attacks.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 12''' — Avernus can launch psychic attacks.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 14''' — Avernus is a place Lycus needs to get out of.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 15''' — A Gate can be opened to Avernus.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 17''' — Lirial is compared to Avernus in terms of power.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 18''' — Avernus is a Territory where time moves more slowly than in the outside world.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 18''' — Avernus is a woman with two sets of wings.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 19''' — Avernus is one of the nine Territories.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 19''' — Avernus has been sealed back into her Territory.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 27''' — Avernus was likely involved in the prophecy.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
